title: vandellia subracemosa
intro: Vandellia subracemosa, also known as "tawas," is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the Philippines and other tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Vandellia subracemosa include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve gas and bloating, and act as a diuretic, which helps to reduce fluid retention. The health benefits of using Vandellia subracemosa include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as indigestion and constipation, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Vandellia subracemosa can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
